summary: A modular Go CLI tool for controlling and querying various macOS system components like apps, audio, bluetooth, and power.
concerns: documentation commits dominating recent history instead of feature work
uncommitted staged and untracked files indicating incomplete work
potential overlap between module/ and modules/ directories
suggestions: consolidate module/ and modules/ directories if redundant
commit or stash the pending changes to maintain a clean state
shift focus from documentation to core feature development
clarify the role of the dep/ package
